CustomField.description: "case((Consent_Form==""Yes"" & HW_Status != """" & HW_Status==""Install Completed"" & Set_Up_Wizard_Completed == ""Complete"" & DMS_Auth_Form_Received_ALL != """" & DMS_Integration_Completed != """" & (Pricing_Wizard_Completed==""Complete"" | (Pricing_Wizard_Express_1_Completed!="""" & Pricing_Wizard_Express_2_Completed!="""")) & int(No_of_OpCodes_Missing) < 200 & OSS_Ledger_Call_Complete != """" & Go_Live_Date != """"),""Complete"", true,""Incomplete"")"
CustomField.label: Installation Step Status
